title: Termination, Budgets, Timeouts, and Progress Detection · State Clinic: Failure Stop
summary: Stop an agent safely under success, failure, budget, and no-progress conditions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops failure stop increment in a loop termination and budget policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify retryable, recoverable, authority-blocked, and terminal failures.
Terminate only when completion evidence satisfies the goal contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
